mapper.insert: INSERT INTO answer (user_id, question_id, delivery_id, content, version, is_final) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{deliveryId}, #{content}, #{version}, #{isFinal})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, question_id, delivery_id, content, version, is_final, submitted_at FROM answer WHERE delivery_id = #{deliveryId} ORDER BY version DESC
SELECT id, user_id, question_id, delivery_id, content, version, is_final, submitted_at FROM answer WHERE delivery_id = #{deliveryId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY version DESC
SELECT id, user_id, question_id, delivery_id, content, version, is_final, submitted_at FROM answer WHERE delivery_id = #{deliveryId} ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, question_id, delivery_id, content, version, is_final, submitted_at FROM answer WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC
